inputs.label: Axial Load
inputs.businessContext: Axial compressive load applied to the column.

businessContext_i18n.en: Axial compressive load applied to the column.
businessContext_i18n.de: Auf die Stütze wirkende axiale Drucklast.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Charge de compression axiale appliquée au poteau.
businessContext_i18n.es: Carga de compresión axial aplicada sobre la columna.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الحمل الانضغاطي المحوري المطبق على العمود.

inputs.label: Etkili Uzunluk (Effective Length)
inputs.businessContext: The buckling length of the column depends on the end connection conditions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Column buckling length depends on end connection conditions.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kolonun burkulma boyu, uç bağlantı koşullarına bağlıdır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Knicklänge der Stütze, abhängig von den Endbedingungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur de flambement du poteau, dépend des conditions d'extrémité.
businessContext_i18n.es: Longitud de pandeo de la columna, depende de las condiciones de apoyo.
businessContext_i18n.ar: طول انبعاج العمود، يعتمد على شروط الوصلات الطرفية.

inputs.label: Elastisite Modülü (Modulus of Elasticity)
inputs.businessContext: Modulus of elasticity of the material; for steel ~200 GPa.

businessContext_i18n.en: Modulus of elasticity of the material; for steel ~200 GPa.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Malzemenin elastikiyet modülü; çelik için ~200 GPa.
businessContext_i18n.de: Elastizitätsmodul des Materials; für Stahl ~200 GPa.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Module d'élasticité du matériau ; pour l'acier ~200 GPa.
businessContext_i18n.es: Módulo de elasticidad del material; para acero ~200 GPa.
businessContext_i18n.ar: معامل مرونة المادة؛ للصلب ~200 جيجا باسكال.

inputs.label: Atalet Momenti (Moment of Inertia)
inputs.businessContext: Area moment of inertia of the section about the weak axis.

businessContext_i18n.en: Area moment of inertia about the weak axis of the section.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kesitin zayıf eksene göre alan atalet momenti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Flächenträgheitsmoment des Querschnitts um die schwache Achse.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Moment d'inertie de la section par rapport à l'axe faible.
businessContext_i18n.es: Momento de inercia del área de la sección respecto al eje débil.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عزم القصور الذاتي للمقطع حول المحور الضعيف.

inputs.label: Kesit Alanı (Cross-Sectional Area)
inputs.businessContext: Total area of the column cross-section.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total area of the column section.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Aire totale de la section du poteau.
businessContext_i18n.es: Área total de la sección transversal de la columna.

inputs.label: Akma Dayanımı (Yield Strength)
inputs.businessContext: Yield strength of the material; for structural steel typically 235-355 MPa.

businessContext_i18n.en: Yield strength of the material; typical for structural steel 235-355 MPa.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Malzemenin akma mukavemeti; yapı çeliği için tipik 235-355 MPa.
businessContext_i18n.de: Streckgrenze des Materials; für Baustahl typisch 235-355 MPa.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Résistance à la traction du matériau ; pour l'acier de construction typique 235-355 MPa.
businessContext_i18n.es: Resistencia a la fluencia del material; para acero estructural típico 235-355 MPa.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجهاد الخضوع للمادة؛ للصلب الإنشائي نموذجياً 235-355 ميجا باسكال.

inputs.label: Güvenlik Faktörü (Safety Factor)
inputs.businessContext: Safety factor desired in the design.

businessContext_i18n.fr: Coefficient de sécurité souhaité dans la conception.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coeficiente de seguridad deseado en el diseño.

breakdown: P / Math.min(Math.PI ** 2 * E * I / (100 * L ** 2), A * Fy / (10 * SF))
suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
